[Sun 2026-04-05 09:17 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: # APEX Redesign — Agent 2: Landing Page Overhaul + Core Pages

## CRITICAL: Landing Page Complete Redesign

The Dashboard at ~/magi-v2/frontend/dashboard/index.html is the LANDING PAGE. Lucy wants a COMPLETE overhaul — not just color swap, but a new layout inspired by AlphaClaw Apex.

### New Landing Page Design:

**Layout:**
- Full sidebar nav on left (from shared nav.js — `renderNav('dashboard')`)
- Main content area: NOT just a list of app cards anymore

**Hero Section (top of main content):**
- Large "MAGI" text in JetBrains Mono, font-weight 700, 48px
- Below: status line showing "X agents online · System healthy" with green pulse dot
- Subtle grid texture background (from core.css)

**Quick Stats Row (below hero):**
- 4 stat cards in a row: Active Agents, Messages Today, Uptime, Token Usage
- Each stat card: large monospace number with count-up animation, small uppercase label
- Cards have `background: var(--bg-elevated); border: 1px solid var(--border);`
- Numbers use `data-countup` attribute for animation

**Recent Activity Feed (main area):**
- Real-time scrolling list of recent events (from /api/analytics/events)
- Each row: timestamp (dim) | agent name (cyan) | action | detail
- Minimal table style, no borders except subtle row separator

**Quick Actions Grid (below stats):**
- 2x3 grid of quick action cards (most used features)
- Each card: icon + label + subtle description
- Cards: Chat, Roundtable, Vault, Tasks, Monitor, Settings
- Hover: border-color brightens, subtle cyan glow
- Click: triggers page transition animation

**System Health Bar (bottom):**
- Thin bar showing CPU, Memory, Disk as small progress indicators
- Green/yellow/red based on thresholds

### Current file reference:
Read ~/magi-v2/frontend/dashboard/index.html for the current structure.

### Implementation:
- Import shared core.css, components.css, nav.js, transitions.js, countup.js
- Use `initTransitions()` on load
- Quick action cards use `navTo()` for transitions
- Stats use `data-countup` for number animation
- Fetch stats from: `/api/agents`, `/api/analytics`, `/api/monitor/agents`
- Keep the PWA manifest + service worker references

## Core Pages (Visual Update Only)

For these 4 pages, the shared infrastructure change (core.css) will automatically update most visuals. But check each and fix any remaining inline styles that conflict with Apex:

### Chat (~/magi-v2/frontend/chat/index.html)
- Read the file
- Remove any remaining inline CSS that overrides shared tokens
- Make sure sidebar uses Apex styling (cyan active border, JetBrains Mono)
- Agent colors in chat can stay unique per agent
- Welcome screen cards should use stagger-item class
- Verify it imports transitions.js and uses initTransitions()
- Add `<script type="module">import { initTransitions } from '/shared/transitions.js'; initTransitions();</script>`

### Vault (~/magi-v2/frontend/vault/index.html)
- Same: remove conflicting inline CSS
- Editor area should use JetBrains Mono (already monospace)
- Note list should have stagger-item class
- Graph view colors: nodes should be cyan instead of indigo

### Roundtable (~/magi-v2/frontend/roundtable/index.html)
- Agent response cards: add stagger-item class
- Remove inline CSS overrides
- Synthesis section: cyan accent

### Knowledge (~/magi-v2/frontend/knowledge/index.html)
- Article list: stagger-item class
- Category badges: use new badge colors
- Remove inline CSS overrides

## Rules
- Read EACH file fully before editing
- Read the NEW shared files (core.css, components.css, nav.js, transitions.js, countup.js) — they may not exist yet, so check and use the spec from the task description above
- Landing page should feel PREMIUM — this is the first thing Lucy sees
- Add `class="stagger-item"` to repeating card/row elements
- Add `data-countup="VALUE"` to stat numbers
- Import and call `initTransitions()` on every page
- Ensure nav sidebar appears on all pages
- Mobile responsive: stats stack to 2x2, quick actions stack to 1 column
I'll start by reading all the relevant files to understand the current state before making any changes.

MAGI
Your apps, one place.
Checking...

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json"><meta name="theme-color" content="#060a14"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0">
<title>MAGI — Council Canvas</title>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/core.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/components.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/shared/atom-one-dark.min.css">
<style>
/* ═══ LAYOUT ═══ */
.app{display:flex;height:100dvh;position:relative}

/* ═══ CHAT SIDEBAR ═══ */
.chat-sidebar{width:260px;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--bg-elevated);border-right:1px solid var(--glass-border);z-index:5;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;transition:margin-left .25s var(--ease-out)}
.chat-sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:-260px}

.sb-header{padding:14px 16px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.sb-logo{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--color-accent),var(--color-primary));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.sb-tag{font-size:8px;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-top:2px}
.sb-toggle{margin-left:auto;width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.sb-toggle:hover{background:var(--glass-hover);color:var(--text-secondary)}

.sb-new{margin:10px 12px;padding:11px;border:1px dashed rgba(99,102,241,.2);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.04),rgba(52,211,153,.03));color:var(--color-primary);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s var(--ease-out);text-align:center;letter-spacing:.3px}
.sb-new:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(99,102,241,.1),rgba(52,211,153,.06));border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.3);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(99,102,241,.08)}

.sb-section{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:12px 16px 4px}

.sb-sessions{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px 8px}
.sb-sess{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--duration-fast);margin-bottom:2px;border:1px solid transparent}
.sb-sess:hover{background:var(--glass)}
.sb-sess.active{background:var(--color-primary-dim);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}
.sb-sess-icon{font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.sb-sess-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.sb-sess-meta{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:1px}
.sb-sess-del{opacity:0;width:20px;height:20px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--duration-fast);flex-shrink:0}
.sb-sess:hover .sb-sess-del{opacity:1}
.sb-sess-del:hover{background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);color:var(--color-danger)}

.sb-footer{padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);display:flex;gap:6px}
.sb-foot-btn{flex:1;padding:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.sb-foot-btn:hover{background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-secondary)}

/* ═══ MAIN AREA ═══ */
.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;z-index:1;min-width:0}

/* Top bar */
.topbar{height:var(--topbar-height);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 16px;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:rgba(10,14,28,.5);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px)}
.tb-hamburger{width:30px;height:30px;border:none;background:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:var(--radius-md);transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.tb-hamburger:hover{background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-secondary)}
.tb-hamburger.hidden{display:none}
.tb-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.tb-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 12px;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:999px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary)}
.tb-help{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);color:var(--text-tertiary);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.tb-help:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08);color:var(--color-primary);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.15)}

/* Help panel */
.help-panel{position:fixed;top:var(--topbar-height);right:0;width:min(380px,100vw);height:calc(100vh - var(--topbar-height));background:rgba(10,14,28,.95);border-left:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);z-index:50;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .25s var(--ease-out)}
.help-panel.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.help-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.help-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text-muted);margin:18px 0 8px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border)}
.help-card{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);margin-bottom:6px}
.help-card:hover{background:var(--glass-hover)}
.help-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.help-card-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 6px currentColor}
.help-card-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600}
.help-card-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary)}
.help-card-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.5}
.help-feature{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.help-feature:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.help-feature-icon{font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;width:28px;text-align:center}
.help-feature-info{flex:1}
.help-feature-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:2px}
.help-feature-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-tertiary);line-height:1.5}

/* ═══ CHAT AREA ═══ */
.chat-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;padding-bottom:160px}
.cards-area{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}

/* Council Visualizer */
.council-viz{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 8px;padding:12px 0;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.viz-strip{display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:0 8px}
.viz-agent{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);padding:4px 6px;border-radius:10px;min-width:52px}
.viz-agent:hover{background:var(--glass)}
.viz-agent.speaking{transform:scale(1.08)}
.viz-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;position:relative;transition:all .3s var(--ease-out);border:2px solid transparent}
.viz-avatar::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all .3s;animation:none}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar{border-color:var(--color-primary);box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(52,211,153,.3)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-avatar::after{border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.3);animation:vizPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-avatar{border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.4);animation:vizBreathe 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.viz-name{font-size:8px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-tertiary);text-align:center;max-width:52px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;transition:color .3s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-name{color:var(--color-accent)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-name{color:var(--color-warning)}
.viz-status{position:absolute;bottom:-1px;right:-1px;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid var(--bg-base);background:var(--text-tertiary)}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-status{background:var(--color-accent);box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(52,211,153,.5)}
.viz-agent.thinking .viz-status{background:var(--color-warning)}
.viz-bubble{position:absolute;top:-24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(14,18,36,.9);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:8px;color:var(--text-secondary);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s}
.viz-agent.speaking .viz-bubble,.viz-agent.thinking .viz-bubble{opacity:1}
@keyframes vizPulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.6}50%{transform:scale(1.15);opacity:0}}
@keyframes vizBreathe{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.04)}}

/* Welcome screen */
.welcome{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:60vh;text-align:center;padding:40px 20px}
.welcome h1{font-size:32px;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--color-accent),var(--color-primary),#A78BFA);background-size:200% auto;-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;margin-bottom:8px;animation:shimmer 3s linear infinite}
.welcome p{color:var(--text-tertiary);font-size:14px;max-width:420px;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:24px}
.welcome-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;max-width:520px;width:100%}
.welcome-card{padding:14px 12px;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s var(--ease-out)}
.welcome-card:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.welcome-card .wc-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:6px}
.welcome-card .wc-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary)}
.welcome-card .wc-desc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.4}

/* Responsive welcome grid */
@media(max-width:480px){.welcome-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
@media(min-width:481px) and (max-width:768px){.welcome-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}

/* ═══ CARDS ═══ */
.card{background:var(--bg-surface);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.03) inset;overflow:hidden;transition:all .2s var(--ease-out);animation:cardIn .3s var(--ease-out)}
.card:hover{border-color:var(--glass-border-hover)}
@keyframes cardIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}

.card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03);background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.02),transparent)}
.card-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 8px currentColor}
.card-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.2px}
.card-tag{font-size:8px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--color-primary-dim);color:var(--color-primary);font-weight:600}
.card-time{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:auto}
.card-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-left:8px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s}
.card:hover .card-actions{opacity:1}
.card-act{padding:3px 8px;font-size:9px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.card-act:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);color:var(--color-primary)}

.card-body{padding:12px 16px;font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--text-primary)}
.card-body.streaming{border-left:2px solid var(--color-primary);margin-left:-1px;animation:streamGlow 2s infinite}
@keyframes streamGlow{0%,100%{border-color:var(--color-primary)}50%{border-color:var(--color-accent)}}

/* User card */
.card.user{background:rgba(99,102,241,.04);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.08)}
.card.user .card-head{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(99,102,241,.05),transparent)}

/* Markdown in cards */
.card-body pre{background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:12px;overflow-x:auto;margin:8px 0;font-size:12px;position:relative}
.card-body code{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.88em}
.card-body :not(pre)>code{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px}
.card-body p{margin:4px 0}.card-body p:first-child{margin-top:0}.card-body p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.card-body table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;margin:6px 0;font-size:12px}
.card-body th,.card-body td{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);padding:5px 8px;text-align:left}
.card-body th{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);font-weight:600;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary)}
.card-body ul,.card-body ol{margin:4px 0;padding-left:20px}
.card-body blockquote{border-left:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-left:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin:6px 0;font-style:italic}
.card-body h1,.card-body h2,.card-body h3{margin:10px 0 4px;font-weight:600}
.card-body h1{font-size:18px}.card-body h2{font-size:16px}.card-body h3{font-size:14px}
.card-body a{color:var(--color-primary);text-decoration:none}
.card-body strong{font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary)}

/* Visual frame */
.visual-frame{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--radius-md);margin-top:8px;background:#1a1a2e;overflow:hidden}
.visual-frame iframe{width:100%;height:400px;border:none}
.visual-frame .vf-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.visual-frame .vf-bar span{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
.visual-frame .vf-bar a{font-size:9px;color:var(--color-accent);text-decoration:none}
.visual-loading{padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-size:11px;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite}

/* System message */
.sys-msg{text-align:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:8px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px}
.sys-msg::before,.sys-msg::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);max-width:80px}

/* ═══ BOTTOM BAR ═══ */
.bottom-wrap{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:260px;right:0;z-index:20;pointer-events:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:0 16px 14px;transition:left .25s var(--ease-out)}
.bottom-wrap.full{left:0}

.chat-bar{pointer-events:all;width:min(720px,100%);background:rgba(14,18,36,.7);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:16px;backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(1.2);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(1.2);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05) inset;transition:all .25s var(--ease-out)}
.chat-bar:focus-within{border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.18);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,.05),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05) inset}

.cb-input{width:100%;background:none;border:none;padding:16px 18px 6px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:15px;font-family:inherit;resize:none;outline:none;min-height:48px;max-height:120px;line-height:1.5}
.cb-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);font-weight:300}

.cb-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:6px 10px 10px;gap:6px}
.cb-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.cb-right{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}

/* Mode/Agent selector pill */
.mode-select{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:5px 11px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-tertiary);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all var(--duration-fast);position:relative}
.mode-select:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);color:var(--color-primary);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}
.mode-select .ms-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}

/* Tool pills */
.tool-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);color:var(--text-tertiary);font-size:10px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.tool-pill:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.06);color:var(--color-primary);border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.12)}

/* Send/Stop */
.cb-send{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);border:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--color-accent),#10B981);color:var(--bg-base);font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;transition:all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-out);box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(52,211,153,.15)}
.cb-send:hover:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(52,211,153,.25)}
.cb-send:disabled{opacity:.15;cursor:default;box-shadow:none}
.cb-stop{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,.15);background:rgba(248,113,113,.04);color:var(--color-danger);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.cb-stop.show{display:flex}

/* ═══ DROPDOWNS ═══ */
.dropdown{position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 8px);left:0;min-width:340px;max-height:420px;background:rgba(14,18,36,.92);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.04) inset;backdrop-filter:blur(28px);display:none;z-index:40;overflow:hidden;flex-direction:column}
.dropdown.show{display:flex;animation:dropIn .2s var(--ease-out)}
@keyframes dropIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.dd-sticky{padding:6px;flex-shrink:0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.dd-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px}
.dd-header{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:6px 8px 2px}
.dd-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.dd-item:hover{background:rgba(99,102,241,.08)}
.dd-item.active{background:rgba(99,102,241,.1);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,.12) inset}
.dd-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 6px currentColor}
.dd-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary)}
.dd-desc{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-tertiary)}
.dd-search{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:11px;font-family:inherit;outline:none;margin-bottom:4px}
.dd-search:focus{border-color:rgba(99,102,241,.2)}
.dd-sep{height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);margin:4px 0}
.dd-agent-check{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--duration-fast);font-size:11px}
.dd-agent-check:hover{background:var(--glass)}
.dd-agent-check input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:var(--color-accent);cursor:pointer;width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.dd-agent-check .ac-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.dd-agent-check .ac-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);min-width:68px;display:inline-block}
.dd-agent-check .ac-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary);opacity:.7}
.dd-select-all{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--color-primary);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.dd-select-all:hover{color:var(--text-primary)}

/* ═══ RESPONSIVE ═══ */
@media(max-width:768px){
  .chat-sidebar{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;z-index:50;box-shadow:4px 0 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
  .chat-sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:-260px}
  .bottom-wrap{left:0!important}
}
@media(min-width:769px){
  .bottom-wrap{left:calc(260px + var(--nav-width))}
  .bottom-wrap.full{left:var(--nav-width)}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="nav"></div>
<div class="app">
  <!-- Chat Sidebar -->
  <div class="chat-sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-header">
      <a href="/dashboard/" style="text-decoration:none"><div class="sb-logo">MAGI</div><div class="sb-tag">Council Canvas</div></a>
      <button class="sb-toggle" id="sbToggle" onclick="toggleSidebar()">◀</button>
    </div>
    <button class="sb-new" onclick="newSession()">+ New Session</button>
    <div class="sb-section">Sessions</div>
    <div class="sb-sessions" id="sessionList"><div class="empty-state"><span class="spinner spinner-sm"></span></div></div>
    <div class="sb-footer">
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="openSettings()">⚙️ Settings</button>
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="forkSession()">🌀 Fork</button>
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="saveSessionToObsidian()">📝 Obsidian</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main -->
  <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
      <button class="tb-hamburger" id="tbHamburger" onclick="toggleSidebar()">☰</button>
      <span class="tb-title" id="tbTitle">New Session</span>
      <div class="tb-pill" id="ws-indicator"><div class="ws-dot" id="wsDot"></div><span class="ws-label" id="wsLabel">Connecting</span></div>
      <button class="tb-help" onclick="toggleHelp()" title="Guide">?</button>
    </div>

    <div class="chat-scroll" id="chatScroll">
      <div class="council-viz" id="councilViz">
        <div class="viz-strip" id="vizStrip"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="welcome" id="welcome">
        <h1>MAGI Council</h1>
        <p>12 AI agents organized in 5 layers — Intelligence, Strategy, Guard Rails, Blueprint, and Core Council. Pick a mode and start asking.</p>
        <div class="welcome-grid">
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="pickMode('council');closeModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">🏛</div><div class="wc-name">Council</div><div class="wc-desc">Ask one agent</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="pickMode('roundtable');closeModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">🔮</div><div class="wc-name">Roundtable</div><div class="wc-desc">All agents debate</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="toggleModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">💬</div><div class="wc-name">Private</div><div class="wc-desc">1-on-1 with agent</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="promptVisual()"><div class="wc-icon">🎨</div><div class="wc-name">Visual</div><div class="wc-desc">Diagrams & charts</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="openSettings()"><div class="wc-icon">⚡</div><div class="wc-name">Intensity</div><div class="wc-desc">Control depth</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="toggleHelp()"><div class="wc-icon">📖</div><div class="wc-name">Guide</div><div class="wc-desc">Features & agents</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cards-area" id="cardsArea"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Bottom bar -->
<div class="bottom-wrap" id="bottomWrap">
  <div class="chat-bar" id="chatBar">
    <textarea class="cb-input" id="inp" rows="1" placeholder="Ask the Council..." onkeydown="onKey(event)" oninput="autoGrow(this)"></textarea>
    <div class="cb-footer">
      <div class="cb-left">
        <div style="position:relative">
          <button class="mode-select" id="modeBtn" onclick="toggleModeDD()">
            <span class="ms-dot" id="modeDot" style="background:var(--color-accent)"></span>
            <span id="modeName">Council</span>
            <span style="font-size:8px;opacity:.5">▾</span>
          </button>
          <div class="dropdown" id="modeDD"></div>
        </div>
        <button class="tool-pill" onclick="promptVisual()">🎨 Visual</button>
        <button class="tool-pill" onclick="forkSession()">🌀 Fork</button>
      </div>
      <div class="cb-right">
        <button class="cb-stop" id="btnStop" onclick="doStop()">■</button>
        <button class="cb-send" id="btnSend" onclick="doSend()">↑</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Settings overlay -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="settingsOverlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeSettings()">
  <div class="modal" style="width:min(560px,92vw)">
    <div class="modal-header">⚙️ Settings <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon" onclick="closeSettings()" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:18px">×</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-bottom:8px">Presets</div>
      <div id="presetGrid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(110px,1fr));gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px"></div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin:16px 0 8px">Agent Intensity</div>
      <div id="intAgents"></div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin:16px 0 8px">Reasoning Mode</div>
      <div id="reasoningModes" style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="clearCards()">🗑 Clear Chat</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveSettings()">Save</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="help-panel" id="helpPanel"></div>

<script src="/shared/marked.min.js"></script>
<script src="/shared/highlight.min.js"></script>
<script type="module">
import { initPage, api, toast, escHtml, timeAgo, setLoading, $, $el } from '/shared/core.js';
import { renderNav } from '/shared/nav.js';
import { renderMarkdown, renderMarkdownInto } from '/shared/markdown.js';
import { WSManager } from '/shared/ws-manager.js';

await initPage();
renderNav('chat');

// Restore sidebar state
const savedSidebarState = localStorage.getItem('magi-chat-sidebar');
let sidebarOpen = savedSidebarState !== 'collapsed';
if (!sidebarOpen) {
  $('sidebar')?.classList.add('collapsed');
  $('bottomWrap')?.classList.add('full');
  const ham = $('tbHamburger'); if (ham) ham.classList.remove('hidden');
  const tog = $('sbToggle'); if (tog) tog.textContent = '▶';
}

marked.use({gfm:true,breaks:true});

let A={},LO=[],gen=false,curCard=null,curRaw='',mode='council',aa='rafael',curMode='reasoning';
let INT={preset:'balanced',agents:{}},PRESETS={},MODS={};
let sessions=[],curSess=null;
let selectedAgents=new Set();

// ── WS via WSManager ──
const wsUrl=(location.protocol==='https:'?'wss://':'ws://')+location.host+'/ws/chat';
const wsm=new WSManager(wsUrl);
wsm.on('open',()=>toast('Connected','success'));
wsm.on('message',handleWS);
wsm.on('max-retries',()=>toast('Connection lost. Refresh to retry.','danger'));
wsm.connect();

function handleWS(m){switch(m.type){
  case'connected':case'ack':break;
  case'intensity_update':INT=m.state||INT;break;
  case'agent_start':{setVizState(m.agentId,'thinking');curRaw='';curCard=addAgentCard(m.agentId);setGen(true);break}
  case'chunk':if(curCard){curRaw+=m.chunk;setVizState(m.agentId,'speaking');const b=curCard.querySelector('.card-body');if(b)b.textContent=curRaw;scrollBottom()}break;
  case'agent_done':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,m.text||curRaw,m.agentId);curCard=null;curRaw=''}
    setVizState(m.agentId,'idle');setGen(false);break;
  case'rt_start':addSysMsg('Roundtable started — '+m.total+' agents');setGen(true);break;
  case'rt_agent_start':{setVizState(m.agentId,'thinking');curRaw='';curCard=addAgentCard(m.agentId);break}
  case'rt_chunk':if(curCard){curRaw+=m.chunk;setVizState(m.agentId,'speaking');const b=curCard.querySelector('.card-body');if(b)b.textContent=curRaw;scrollBottom()}break;
  case'rt_agent_done':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,m.text||curRaw,m.agentId);curCard=null;curRaw=''}
    setVizState(m.agentId,'idle');break;
  case'rt_done':addSysMsg('Roundtable complete');setGen(false);clearVizStates();break;
  case'stopped':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,curRaw);curCard=null;curRaw=''}setGen(false);break;
}}

// ── Init ──
async function bootChat(){
  try{const {data}=await api('agents');if(data){A=data.agents||{};LO=data.layerOrder||[];selectedAgents=new Set(Object.keys(A));buildViz()}}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] agents:',e)}
  try{const {data}=await api('intensity');if(data){INT={preset:data.preset||'balanced',agents:data.agents||{}};PRESETS=data.presets||{};MODS=data.modifiers||{}}}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] intensity:',e)}
  try{await loadSessions()}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] sessions:',e)}
  document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape'){closeModeDD();closeSettings();if(helpOpen)toggleHelp()}});
  if(!sessions.length) await newSession();
}
bootChat();

// ── Sessions ──
async function loadSessions(){
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions');
  if(error){toast('Failed to load sessions','danger');return}
  sessions=data||[];renderSessions();
}
function renderSessions(){
  const list=$('sessionList');if(!list)return;list.innerHTML='';
  if(!sessions.length){list.innerHTML='<div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-state-text">No sessions yet</div></div>';return}
  const icons={council:'🏛',roundtable:'🔮',private:'💬'};
  sessions.forEach(s=>{
    const div=document.createElement('div');div.className='sb-sess'+(curSess?.id===s.id?' active':'');
    div.onclick=()=>openSession(s.id);
    const ago=timeAgo(s.updatedAt);
    div.innerHTML='<span class="sb-sess-icon">'+(icons[s.mode]||'💬')+'</span><div class="sb-sess-info"><div class="sb-sess-title">'+escHtml(s.title)+'</div><div class="sb-sess-meta">'+s.messageCount+' msgs · '+ago+'</div></div><button class="sb-sess-del" onclick="event.stopPropagation();window._deleteSession(\''+s.id+'\')" title="Delete">×</button>';
    list.appendChild(div);
  });
}
async function newSession(){
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions',{method:'POST',body:{mode,title:'New Session'}});
  if(error){toast('Failed to create session','danger');return}
  sessions.unshift(data.session);curSess=data.session;renderSessions();clearCardsUI();updateTitle();
  const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display='';
}
async function openSession(id){
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions/'+id);
  if(error||!data?.ok){toast('Failed to load session','danger');return}
  curSess=data.session;renderSessions();clearCardsUI();updateTitle();
  const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display=data.session.messages?.length?'none':'';
  for(const msg of data.session.messages||[]){
    if(msg.role==='user')addUserCard(msg.text,false);
    else if(msg.role==='agent'){const c=addAgentCard(msg.agentId,false);if(c)finCard(c,msg.text,msg.agentId)}
  }
  scrollBottom();
  if(window.innerWidth<=768){sidebarOpen=false;$('sidebar')?.classList.add('collapsed');$('bottomWrap')?.classList.add('full');localStorage.setItem('magi-chat-sidebar','collapsed')}
}
async function deleteSession(id){
  const {error}=await api('sessions/'+id,{method:'DELETE'});
  if(error){toast('Failed to delete','danger');return}
  sessions=sessions.filter(s=>s.id!==id);
  if(curSess?.id===id){curSess=sessions[0]||null;if(curSess)openSession(curSess.id);else{clearCardsUI();const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display=''}}
  renderSessions();toast('Session deleted','success');
}
window._deleteSession=deleteSession;
async function forkSession(){
  if(!curSess){toast('No session to fork','warning');return}
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions/'+curSess.id+'/fork',{method:'POST'});
  if(error){toast('Fork failed','danger');return}
  sessions.unshift(data.session);openSession(data.session.id);toast('🌀 Session forked!','success');
}
window.forkSession=forkSession;
function updateTitle(){const el=$('tbTitle');if(el)el.textContent=curSess?.title||'New Session'}

// ── Sidebar ──
function toggleSidebar(){
  sidebarOpen=!sidebarOpen;
  $('sidebar')?.classList.toggle('collapsed',!sidebarOpen);
  $('bottomWrap')?.classList.toggle('full',!sidebarOpen);
  const tog=$('sbToggle');if(tog)tog.textContent=sidebarOpen?'◀':'▶';
  const ham=$('tbHamburger');if(ham)ham.classList.toggle('hidden',sidebarOpen);
  localStorage.setItem('magi-chat-sidebar',sidebarOpen?'open':'collapsed');
}
window.toggleSidebar=toggleSidebar;

// ── Mode Dropdown ──
const MODES=[
  {id:'council',icon:'🏛',name:'Council',desc:'All agents respond',color:'var(--color-accent)',dot:'var(--color-accent)'},
  {id:'roundtable',icon:'🔮',name:'Roundtable',desc:'Turn-based debate',color:'var(--color-warning)',dot:'var(--color-warning)'},
  {id:'private',icon:'💬',name:'Private',desc:'Chat with one agent',color:'var(--color-primary)',dot:'var(--color-primary)',sub:true}
];
function buildModeDD(){
  const dd=$('modeDD');if(!dd)return;dd.innerHTML='';
  const isPrivate=mode==='private';
  let sticky='<div class="dd-sticky">';
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='council'?' active':'')+'" onclick="window._pickMode(\'council\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--color-accent);color:var(--color-accent)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">🏛 Council</div><div class="dd-desc">All agents respond independently</div></div></div>';
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='roundtable'?' active':'')+'" onclick="window._pickMode(\'roundtable\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--color-warning);color:var(--color-warning)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">🔮 Roundtable</div><div class="dd-desc">All selected agents debate in turns</div></div></div>';
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='private'?' active':'')+'" onclick="window._showPrivateList()"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--color-primary);color:var(--color-primary)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">💬 Private'+(mode==='private'?' → '+((A[aa]||{}).name||aa):'')+'</div><div class="dd-desc">Chat 1-on-1 with a specific agent</div></div></div>';
  if(!isPrivate){
    sticky+='<div class="dd-sep"></div>';
    sticky+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:2px 8px"><div class="dd-header" style="padding:0">Participating ('+selectedAgents.size+'/'+Object.keys(A).length+')</div>';
    sticky+='<span class="dd-select-all" onclick="window._toggleAllAgents()">Toggle All</span></div>';
  }
  sticky+='</div>';
  let scroll='<div class="dd-scroll" id="ddScroll">';
  const sorted=Object.entries(A).sort((a,b)=>(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0));
  if(!isPrivate){
    for(const[id,a]of sorted){
      const checked=selectedAgents.has(id)?'checked':'';
      scroll+='<label class="dd-agent-check"><input type="checkbox" '+checked+' onchange="window._toggleAgent(\''+id+'\',this.checked)"><span class="ac-dot" style="background:'+a.color+'"></span><span class="ac-name">'+a.name+'</span><span class="ac-role">'+(a.desc||a.role)+'</span></label>';
    }
  }
  scroll+='<div id="privateList" style="display:'+(isPrivate?'block':'none')+'">';
  if(!isPrivate)scroll+='<div class="dd-sep"></div>';
  scroll+='<div class="dd-header">Select agent for Private chat</div>';
  scroll+='<input class="dd-search" placeholder="Search agents..." oninput="window._filterAgents(this.value)">';
  for(const[id,a]of sorted){
    scroll+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='private'&&aa===id?' active':'')+'" data-name="'+a.name.toLowerCase()+'" onclick="window._pickAgent(\''+id+'\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:'+a.color+';color:'+a.color+'"></div><div><div class="dd-name">'+a.name+'</div><div class="dd-desc">'+(a.desc||a.role)+'</div></div></div>';
  }
  scroll+='</div></div>';
  dd.innerHTML=sticky+scroll;
}
function showPrivateList(){mode='private';buildModeDD();const scroll=$('ddScroll');if(scroll)scroll.scrollTop=0}
window._showPrivateList=showPrivateList;
function toggleAgent(id,on){if(on)selectedAgents.add(id);else selectedAgents.delete(id);buildModeDD()}
window._toggleAgent=toggleAgent;
function toggleAllAgents(){if(selectedAgents.size===Object.keys(A).length)selectedAgents.clear();else selectedAgents=new Set(Object.keys(A));buildModeDD()}
window._toggleAllAgents=toggleAllAgents;
function toggleModeDD(){const d=$('modeDD');if(!d)return;const show=!d.classList.contains('show');if(show)buildModeDD();d.classList.toggle('show',show)}
window.toggleModeDD=toggleModeDD;
function closeModeDD(){$('modeDD')?.classList.remove('show')}
window.closeModeDD=closeModeDD;
function filterAgents(q){q=q.toLowerCase();document.querySelectorAll('#modeDD .dd-scroll .dd-item[data-name]').forEach(i=>{i.style.display=i.dataset.name.includes(q)?'':'none'})}
window._filterAgents=filterAgents;

function pickMode(id){
  mode=id;aa='rafael';
  const m=MODES.find(x=>x.id===id);
  const dot=$('modeDot');if(dot)dot.style.background=m?.dot||'var(--color-accent)';
  const cnt=selectedAgents.size;
  const nm=$('modeName');if(nm)nm.textContent=(m?.name||'Council')+(id!=='private'?' ('+cnt+')':'');
  const inp=$('inp');if(inp)inp.placeholder=id==='roundtable'?'Enter a topic for the roundtable...':'Ask the Council...';
  if(cnt===0&&id!=='private')toast('⚠️ No agents selected — check some in the dropdown!','warning');
  else{closeModeDD();toast(m?.icon+' '+m?.name+(id!=='private'?' — '+cnt+' agents':''))}
}
window._pickMode=pickMode;window.pickMode=pickMode;
function pickAgent(id){
  mode='private';aa=id;
  const a=A[id]||{name:id,color:'#888'};
  const dot=$('modeDot');if(dot)dot.style.background=a.color;
  const nm=$('modeName');if(nm)nm.textContent=a.name;
  const inp=$('inp');if(inp)inp.placeholder='Chat privately with '+a.name+'...';
  closeModeDD();toast('💬 Private → '+a.name);
}
window._pickAgent=pickAgent;

// ── Send ──
function doSend(){
  const inp=$('inp');if(!inp)return;
  const t=inp.value.trim();if(!t||wsm.state!=='connected'||gen)return;inp.value='';autoGrow(inp);
  const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display='none';
  if(/^\/(visual|visualize|diagram|slides)\s+/.test(t)){const topic=t.replace(/^\/(visual|visualize|diagram|slides)\s+/,'');addUserCard(t);generateVisual(topic);return}
  addUserCard(t);

## Completed: APEX Redesign — Agent 2: Landing Page Overhaul + Core Pages

### Dashboard (Landing Page) — Complete Overhaul
Rewrote `/dashboard/index.html` from scratch with a premium Apex-inspired layout:
- **Hero Section**: Large "MAGI" in JetBrains Mono 48px/700, cyan gradient shimmer, status line with green pulse dot ("X agents online · System healthy")
- **Quick Stats Row**: 4 stat cards (Active Agents, Messages Today, Uptime, Token Usage) with `data-countup` animated numbers, monospace font, elevated bg + border
- **Quick Actions Grid**: 2×3 grid of cards (Chat, Roundtable, Vault, Tasks, Monitor, Settings) with icon + label + description, cyan glow hover effect, `navTo()` transition onclick
- **Recent Activity Feed**: Scrolling event list fetched from `/api/analytics/events` with timestamp | agent name (cyan) | action | detail format
- **System Health Bar**: CPU, Memory, Disk progress indicators with green/yellow/red threshold colors
- **Responsive**: Stats → 2×2, actions → 2col then 1col on mobile
- All elements have `stagger-item` class for animated appearance
- Imports: core.css, components.css, nav.js, transitions.js, countup.js
- PWA manifest + service worker references preserved
